testcase.name: testProxyToBaidu
testcase.system-out: 10:36:06.703 [main] DEBUG com.proxy.common.spi.ExtensionLoader - Loaded 1 extension classes for type: com.proxy.common.exchange.Exchanger: [header] 10:36:06.707 [main] DEBUG com.proxy.common.spi.ExtensionLoader - Loaded 1 extension classes for type: com.proxy.common.transport.Transporter: [netty] 10:36:06.762 [main] INFO c.proxy.transport.netty.NettyServer - NettyServer started on 127.0.0.1:53191 (bossThreads=1, workerThreads=2, maxStreams=100, backlog=128) 10:36:06.763 [main] INFO c.p.transport.netty.NettyTransporter - NettyServer started on 127.0.0.1:53191 10:36:06.763 [main] INFO c.p.exchange.header.HeaderExchanger - HeaderExchanger bound ExchangeServer on 127.0.0.1:53191 10:36:06.821 [main] INFO c.p.t.netty.pool.ConnectionPool - Created new HTTP/2 connection to 127.0.0.1:53191, pool size: 1 10:36:06.821 [main] INFO c.proxy.transport.netty.NettyClient - NettyClient connected to 127.0.0.1:53191 via HTTP/2 10:36:06.821 [main] INFO c.p.transport.netty.NettyTransporter - Created NettyClient to 127.0.0.1:53191 10:36:06.822 [main] INFO c.p.exchange.header.HeaderExchanger - HeaderExchanger created ExchangeClient to 127.0.0.1:53191 10:36:06.827 [nioEventLoopGroup-4-1] DEBUG c.proxy.transport.netty.NettyServer - Client connected: /127.0.0.1:53193, active connections: 1 10:36:06.991 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG com.proxy.common.spi.ExtensionLoader - Loaded 4 extension classes for type: com.proxy.common.crypto.Cipher: [aes-gcm, chacha20, aes-ctr-hmac, none] 10:36:06.992 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] WARN com.proxy.crypto.NoneCipher - NoneCipher initialized — data will NOT be encrypted! Do NOT use in production. 10:36:06.997 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG com.proxy.common.spi.ExtensionLoader - Loaded 1 extension classes for type: com.proxy.common.codec.Codec: [proxy] 10:36:07.001 [main] DEBUG c.p.t.netty.pool.ConnectionPool - Opened HTTP/2 stream on connection [id: 0x2c569d25, L:/127.0.0.1:53193 - R:/127.0.0.1:53191], active streams: 1 10:36:07.007 [main] DEBUG c.proxy.transport.netty.NettyClient - Created HTTP/2 stream for streamId=1 10:36:07.021 [nioEventLoopGroup-4-1] WARN com.proxy.crypto.NoneCipher - NoneCipher initialized — data will NOT be encrypted! Do NOT use in production. 10:36:07.024 [pool-2-thread-1] INFO c.p.remote.dispatch.DispatchInvoker - Handle CONNECT: target=www.baidu.com:80 10:36:07.025 [pool-2-thread-1] DEBUG c.p.remote.outbound.SessionManager - Session registered: streamId=1, target=www.baidu.com:80 10:36:07.028 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.p.exchange.header.DefaultFuture - Request completed: requestId=1, status=200, elapsed=199ms 10:36:07.047 [nioEventLoopGroup-2-1] DEBUG c.p.r.outbound.OutboundConnector - Outbound connected: target=www.baidu.com:80, streamId=1 10:36:07.047 [nioEventLoopGroup-2-1] DEBUG c.p.remote.outbound.OutboundSession - OutboundSession active: streamId=1, target=www.baidu.com:80 10:36:07.537 [pool-2-thread-2] DEBUG c.p.remote.dispatch.DispatchInvoker - Handle DATA: streamId=1, target=www.baidu.com:80, dataLength=58 10:36:07.539 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.p.exchange.header.DefaultFuture - Request completed: requestId=2, status=200, elapsed=3ms 10:36:07.559 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.p.exchange.header.ExchangeHandler - Received message without requestId: type=DATA 10:36:07.559 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.p.exchange.header.ExchangeHandler - Received message without requestId: type=DATA 10:36:07.560 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.p.exchange.header.ExchangeHandler - Received message without requestId: type=DATA 10:36:07.562 [nioEventLoopGroup-2-1] DEBUG c.p.remote.outbound.OutboundHandler - Outbound channel to www.baidu.com:80 inactive, closing session: streamId=1 10:36:07.562 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.p.exchange.header.ExchangeHandler - Received message without requestId: type=DATA === Baidu proxy test passed! === Successfully connected to www.baidu.com:80 through proxy HTTP request forwarded, session active. 10:36:09.546 [pool-2-thread-3] INFO c.p.remote.dispatch.DispatchInvoker - Handle DISCONNECT: target=www.baidu.com:80 10:36:09.546 [pool-2-thread-3] DEBUG c.p.remote.outbound.SessionManager - Session removed and closed: streamId=1, target=www.baidu.com:80 10:36:09.547 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.p.t.netty.pool.ConnectionPool - HTTP/2 stream closed, active streams: 0, notified waiting threads 10:36:09.547 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.proxy.transport.netty.NettyClient - Stream 1 closed and removed from mapping 10:36:09.547 [nioEventLoopGroup-5-1] DEBUG c.proxy.transport.netty.NettyClient - Connection disconnected, failing all pending futures 10:36:09.548 [main] INFO c.p.t.n.pool.Http2PooledConnection - Closed HTTP/2 connection: [id: 0x2c569d25, L:/127.0.0.1:53193 - R:/127.0.0.1:53191] 10:36:09.549 [nioEventLoopGroup-4-1] DEBUG c.p.t.n.handler.ServerChannelHandler -
